water.label: Water
water.notes: Visible-range one-term Sellmeier fit for aqueous water.

pbs.label: PBS
pbs.notes: Visible-range one-term Sellmeier fit for PBS-like aqueous buffer.

polystyrene.label: Polystyrene
polystyrene.notes: Visible-range one-term Sellmeier fit for polystyrene microspheres.

silica.label: Silica
silica.notes: Visible-range one-term Sellmeier fit for silica particles.

pmma.label: PMMA
pmma.notes: Visible-range one-term Sellmeier fit for PMMA particles.

soybean_oil.label: Soybean oil
soybean_oil.notes: Visible-range one-term Sellmeier fit for soybean-oil-like cores.

lipid.label: Lipid
lipid.notes: Visible-range one-term Sellmeier fit for lipid-rich particles.

phospholipid.label: Phospholipid
phospholipid.notes: Visible-range one-term Sellmeier fit for phospholipid shells.

fused_silica.label: Fused silica (SiO2, Malitson)
fused_silica.notes: Three-term Sellmeier fit for fused silica at 20 C. Converted from refractiveindex.info Formula 1 coefficients by squaring resonance wavelengths in um.

calcium_fluoride.label: Calcium fluoride (CaF2, Malitson)
calcium_fluoride.notes: Three-term Sellmeier fit for calcium fluoride at 24 C. Converted from refractiveindex.info Formula 1 coefficients by squaring resonance wavelengths in um.

bk7.label: N-BK7 (Schott)
bk7.notes: Three-term Sellmeier fit for Schott N-BK7 optical glass in the visible/near-IR range.

sf10.label: N-SF10 (Schott)
sf10.notes: Three-term Sellmeier fit for Schott N-SF10 flint glass in the visible/near-IR range.
